specification:
Type: Comparative visualization **sim-id:** sex-recombination-differences
**Library:** Chart.js
**Status:** Specified A side-by-side bar chart comparing genetic map distances (in cM) along a human chromosome for males and females. Each bar pair represents a chromosomal interval. A toggle allows users to switch between chromosomes. The total map length is displayed for each sex, highlighting the consistent female-greater-than-male pattern.
